130 N1B N1B_AFTERNOON 36b(N1b)Time Awake - Afternoon CHAR 1 Identifies those periods of a typical afternoon (over the last seven days) when the patient was awake all or most of the time (not more than one hour nap duirng any such period). 0 = Unchecked, 1 = Checked, -1 = Unknown
